center.name: 弗兰格尔岛
center.summary: 弗兰格尔岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括红腹滨鹬、角海鹦，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: roselaari breeds in Wrangel Island in Siberia and north-western Alaska, and it apparently winters in Florida, Panama and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 15"/> Horned Puffin are also found in the vicinity of the Chukchi Sea and especially on Wrangel Island.{{cite book | title=Alaska Outer Continental Shelf, Beaufort Sea and Chukchi Sea Planning Areas, Oil and Gas Lease Sales 209
